name: tavily-web-search
description: Premium web search / extract / crawl via Tavily's official remote MCP server (https://mcp.tavily.com). Opt-in upgrade over the free built-in SearXNG web_search. Platform holds one shared Tavily API key (type-A shared bearer); tenants enable it via their MCP allowlist. Skipped at boot until TAVILY_API_KEY is set.
